---
title: "ALFA-K Benchmark"
subtitle: "Single-round benchmark for nn_prior comparison"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
params:
  patient_subset: !r character(0)
  minobs_values: [5, 10, 20]
  pm_values: [5e-05]
  parameter_labels: ["nn_prior_empirical_censored", "nn_prior_empirical_censored_weighted", "nn_prior_empirical_two_shell", "nn_prior_none", "nn_prior_empirical", "nn_prior_cohort_transition"]
  n_cores: 9
  nboot: 45
  n0: 100000
  nb: 10000000
  benchmark_seed: 31415926
  correct_efflux: true
  nn_prior_grid_n: 81
  nn_prior_fit_subset: "hybrid"
  nn_prior_zero_exposure_quantile: 0.10
  nn_prior_zero_weight_scale: 0.50
  nn_prior_zero_weight_cap_ratio: !r NULL
  nn_prior_zero_birth_fallback_weight: !r NULL
  nn_prior_zero_birth_child_floor: 0.25
  nn_prior_zero_birth_child_shape: 1
  nn_prior_zero_birth_replicate_floor: 0.50
  nn_prior_zero_birth_replicate_shape: 1
  nn_prior_two_step_support: "rescue"
  nn_prior_two_step_support_min: 0.15
  nn_prior_two_step_cap_floor: 0.30
  cohort_transition_version: "contextual"
  include_posterior_comparison: true
  top_shift_n: 15
  run_nn_identifiability: true
  run_nn_stability: true
  run_nn_holdout: false
  nn_holdout_repeats: 5
  nn_holdout_fraction: 0.25
  nn_holdout_min_count: 2
  nn_holdout_seed: 271828
  run_nn_simulation: false
  nn_simulation_n: 50
  nn_simulation_seed: 161803
  nn_simulation_scenarios: ["sparse_zero_heavy", "moderate_observed", "two_step_supported"]
  force_refit: false
  rebuild_inputs: false
  run_benchmark: true
  render_figures: true
  focus_pids: ["P2", "P8", "P19"]
  focus_pid: ""
  focus_minobs: 20
  focus_pm: 5e-05
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  dpi = 150
)

resolve_repo_dir_light <- function() {
  candidates <- unique(c(
    tryCatch(dirname(knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE)), error = function(e) NA_character_),
    getwd()
  ))

  for (cand in candidates) {
    if (is.na(cand) || !nzchar(cand)) {
      next
    }
    cand_norm <- normalizePath(cand, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
    if (file.exists(file.path(cand_norm, "DESCRIPTION")) &&
        dir.exists(file.path(cand_norm, "benchmark"))) {
      return(cand_norm)
    }
    parent2 <- normalizePath(file.path(cand_norm, "..", ".."), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
    if (file.exists(file.path(parent2, "DESCRIPTION")) &&
        dir.exists(file.path(parent2, "benchmark"))) {
      return(parent2)
    }
  }

  stop("Could not locate the alfakR repository root from the current knitting context.")
}

repo_dir <- resolve_repo_dir_light()
sys.source(file.path(repo_dir, "benchmark", "scr", "run_benchmark_pipeline.R"), envir = knitr::knit_global())
benchmark_run <- run_benchmark_pipeline_entry(params = params, repo_dir = repo_dir)

ctx <- benchmark_run$ctx
focus_results <- benchmark_run$focus_results
```

```{r html-table-style, results='asis'}
if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
  cat(
    "<style>\n",
    "table.three-line-table {\n",
    "  width: auto;\n",
    "  margin-left: 0;\n",
    "  border-collapse: collapse;\n",
    "  border-top: 2px solid #222 !important;\n",
    "  border-bottom: 2px solid #222 !important;\n",
    "}\n",
    "table.three-line-table thead th {\n",
    "  border-bottom: 1px solid #222 !important;\n",
    "}\n",
    "table.three-line-table th,\n",
    "table.three-line-table td {\n",
    "  border-left: none !important;\n",
    "  border-right: none !important;\n",
    "  padding: 0.35em 0.65em;\n",
    "  background: transparent !important;\n",
    "}\n",
    ".report-image-grid {\n",
    "  display: grid;\n",
    "  gap: 1rem;\n",
    "  margin: 0.5rem 0 1rem 0;\n",
    "}\n",
    ".report-image-grid-item {\n",
    "  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;\n",
    "  padding: 0.75rem;\n",
    "  background: #fff;\n",
    "}\n",
    ".report-image-grid-title {\n",
    "  font-weight: 600;\n",
    "  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;\n",
    "  text-align: center;\n",
    "}\n",
    ".report-image-grid-missing {\n",
    "  min-height: 120px;\n",
    "  display: flex;\n",
    "  align-items: center;\n",
    "  justify-content: center;\n",
    "  color: #6b7280;\n",
    "  background: #f9fafb;\n",
    "}\n",
    "</style>\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}
```

## Selection Summary

```{r retained-sample-tables, results='asis'}
all_sample_fit_index_tbl <- benchmark_run$parameter_results_all_tbl
if (nrow(all_sample_fit_index_tbl)) {
  for (parameter_label_name in ctx$parameter_levels_use) {
    sub_tbl <- all_sample_fit_index_tbl %>%
      dplyr::filter(parameter_label == parameter_label_name) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
        patient_sort_num = suppressWarnings(as.integer(gsub("^\\D+", "", patient_id)))
      ) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(
        dplyr::if_else(is.na(patient_sort_num), Inf, patient_sort_num),
        patient_id,
        minobs,
        pm
      ) %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        patient_id,
        minobs,
        pm = format(pm, scientific = TRUE, trim = TRUE),
        nn_prior,
        status,
        cached,
        xval_r2,
        xval_cor,
        xval_rmse,
        xval_mae,
        n_xval,
        warning_count,
        elapsed_sec,
        error_message
      )
    emit_report_table(
      sub_tbl,
      caption = paste("Per-method full fit index (all samples and all minobs):", parameter_label_name)
    )
  }
} else {
  emit_report_table(empty_note_tbl("No fit results are available yet."), caption = "Per-method full fit index")
}

retained_patient_tbl <- benchmark_run$retained_patient_tbl
if (nrow(retained_patient_tbl)) {
  emit_report_table(retained_patient_tbl, caption = "Common samples retained by all selected methods; only these are shown in Samplewise Results")
} else {
  emit_report_table(empty_note_tbl("No common retained samples are available yet."), caption = "Common samples retained by all selected methods")
}
```

## NN Identifiability

```{r nn-identifiability, results='asis'}
nn_identifiability_summary_tbl <- benchmark_run$nn_identifiability_summary_tbl
if (nrow(nn_identifiability_summary_tbl)) {
  emit_report_table(
    nn_identifiability_summary_tbl %>%
      dplyr::mutate(pm = format(pm, scientific = TRUE, trim = TRUE)) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        parameter_label,
        patient_id,
        minobs,
        pm,
        nn_identifiability_class,
        observed_anchor_rate,
        median_n_observed_children,
        median_zero_weight_ratio,
        median_zero_effective_mass,
        prior_source_observed_replicate_frac,
        prior_source_sample_pooled_frac,
        prior_source_none_frac,
        median_n_zero_children_with_two_step_support,
        median_map_delta_lower_boundary_rate
      ),
    caption = "NN identifiability summary"
  )
} else {
  emit_report_table(empty_note_tbl("No NN identifiability diagnostics are available."), caption = "NN identifiability summary")
}

nn_diagnostic_figure_artifact_tbl <- benchmark_run$nn_diagnostic_figure_artifact_tbl
if (nrow(nn_diagnostic_figure_artifact_tbl)) {
  emit_report_image_grid(
    nn_diagnostic_figure_artifact_tbl %>%
      dplyr::filter(artifact %in% c("nn_identifiability_class", "nn_prior_source_fraction")) %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        title = title,
        path = png_path,
        alt = title
      ),
    cols = 1L
  )
}
```

## NN Bootstrap Stability

```{r nn-stability, results='asis'}
nn_stability_case_tbl <- benchmark_run$nn_stability_case_tbl
nn_stability_pairwise_tbl <- benchmark_run$nn_stability_weighted_empirical_tbl
if (nrow(nn_stability_case_tbl)) {
  emit_report_table(
    nn_stability_case_tbl %>%
      dplyr::mutate(pm = format(pm, scientific = TRUE, trim = TRUE)) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        parameter_label,
        patient_id,
        minobs,
        pm,
        n_nn_children,
        median_finite_fraction,
        median_nn_bootstrap_sd,
        median_nn_bootstrap_iqr
      ),
    caption = "NN bootstrap stability by case"
  )
} else {
  emit_report_table(empty_note_tbl("No NN bootstrap stability diagnostics are available."), caption = "NN bootstrap stability by case")
}

nn_pairwise_availability_tbl <- tibble::tribble(
  ~comparison_label,
  "weighted vs empirical",
  "empirical_two_shell vs empirical",
  "weighted vs empirical_two_shell"
) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    nn_stability_pairwise_tbl %>%
      dplyr::count(comparison_label, name = "n_nn_children_compared"),
    by = "comparison_label"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    n_nn_children_compared = dplyr::coalesce(n_nn_children_compared, 0L),
    comparison_available = dplyr::if_else(n_nn_children_compared > 0L, "yes", "no")
  )
emit_report_table(
  nn_pairwise_availability_tbl,
  caption = "Pairwise NN comparison availability"
)

if (nrow(nn_diagnostic_figure_artifact_tbl)) {
  emit_report_image_grid(
    nn_diagnostic_figure_artifact_tbl %>%
      dplyr::filter(artifact %in% c("nn_stability_by_method", "weighted_empirical_nn_sd_ratio")) %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        title = title,
        path = png_path,
        alt = title
      ),
    cols = 2L
  )
}
```

## NN Holdout And Simulation

```{r nn-holdout-simulation, results='asis'}
nn_holdout_summary_tbl <- benchmark_run$nn_holdout_summary_tbl
if (nrow(nn_holdout_summary_tbl)) {
  emit_report_table(nn_holdout_summary_tbl, caption = "Observed-NN holdout summary")
} else {
  emit_report_table(empty_note_tbl("Observed-NN holdout was not run or produced no predictions."), caption = "Observed-NN holdout summary")
}

nn_simulation_summary_tbl <- benchmark_run$nn_simulation_summary_tbl
if (nrow(nn_simulation_summary_tbl)) {
  emit_report_table(nn_simulation_summary_tbl, caption = "NN simulation truth-calibration summary")
} else {
  emit_report_table(empty_note_tbl("NN simulation calibration was not run or produced no estimates."), caption = "NN simulation truth-calibration summary")
}
```

## All-Sample Landscape Comparison

```{r retained-landscape-comparison, results='asis'}
all_sample_landscape_artifact_tbl <- benchmark_run$all_sample_landscape_artifact_tbl
if (nrow(all_sample_landscape_artifact_tbl)) {
  emit_report_image_grid(
    all_sample_landscape_artifact_tbl %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        title = title,
        path = png_path,
        alt = paste("All-sample landscape distribution for", title)
      ),
    cols = 2L
  )
} else {
  cat("No all-sample landscape distribution plots are available yet.\n")
}
```

## All-Sample Cross-Validation

```{r retained-xval-scatter, results='asis'}
all_sample_xval_artifact_tbl <- benchmark_run$all_sample_xval_artifact_tbl
if (nrow(all_sample_xval_artifact_tbl)) {
  emit_report_image_grid(
    all_sample_xval_artifact_tbl %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        title = title,
        path = png_path,
        alt = paste("All-sample cross-validation for", title)
      ),
    cols = 1L
  )
} else {
  cat("No all-sample cross-validation plots are available yet.\n")
}
```

## All-Sample UMAP

```{r all-sample-umap-grid, results='asis'}
all_sample_umap_artifact_tbl <- benchmark_run$all_sample_umap_artifact_tbl
if (nrow(all_sample_umap_artifact_tbl)) {
  emit_report_image_grid(
    all_sample_umap_artifact_tbl %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        title = title,
        path = png_path,
        alt = paste("All-sample UMAP for", title)
      ),
    cols = 4L
  )
} else {
  cat("No all-sample UMAP plots are available yet.\n")
}
```

## All-Sample Beneficial Karyotype Heatmaps

```{r parameter-beneficial-artifacts-render, results='asis'}
parameter_beneficial_artifact_tbl <- benchmark_run$parameter_beneficial_artifact_tbl
if (nrow(parameter_beneficial_artifact_tbl)) {
  emit_report_table(
    parameter_beneficial_artifact_tbl %>%
      dplyr::select(parameter_label, n_patients),
    caption = "All-sample beneficial-heatmap coverage by parameter label"
  )
  emit_report_image_grid(
    parameter_beneficial_artifact_tbl %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        title = parameter_label,
        path = heatmap_png_path,
        alt = paste("All-sample beneficial heatmap for", parameter_label)
      ),
    cols = 2L
  )
} else {
  emit_report_table(empty_note_tbl("No all-sample beneficial heatmaps are available yet."), caption = "All-sample beneficial-heatmap coverage")
}
```

## Samplewise Results

```{r focus-sections, results='asis'}
if (!length(focus_results)) {
  cat("No retained samples are available for samplewise display.\n")
} else {
  for (focus_pid in names(focus_results)) {
    focus_res <- focus_results[[focus_pid]]
    cat("### ", focus_pid, "\n\n", sep = "")

    if (nrow(focus_res$focus_fit_index_tbl)) {
      emit_report_table(
        focus_res$focus_fit_index_tbl %>%
          dplyr::transmute(
            parameter_label,
            minobs,
            pm,
            nn_prior,
            status,
            xval_r2,
            elapsed_sec,
            cached
          ),
        caption = paste("Retained fit index:", focus_pid)
      )
    } else {
      emit_report_table(empty_note_tbl("No retained fit index is available for this sample."), caption = paste("Retained fit index:", focus_pid))
    }

    if (nrow(focus_res$focus_landscape_summary_tbl)) {
      emit_report_table(focus_res$focus_landscape_summary_tbl, caption = paste("Landscape summary:", focus_pid))
    } else {
      emit_report_table(empty_note_tbl("No landscape summary is available for this sample."), caption = paste("Landscape summary:", focus_pid))
    }

    if (nrow(focus_res$focus_umap_artifact_tbl)) {
      emit_report_image_grid(
        focus_res$focus_umap_artifact_tbl %>%
          dplyr::transmute(
            title = parameter_label,
            path = png_path,
            alt = paste("Focus patient UMAP for", focus_pid, parameter_label)
          ),
        cols = 2L
      )
    }

    if (nrow(focus_res$focus_density_artifact_tbl)) {
      emit_report_image_grid(
        focus_res$focus_density_artifact_tbl %>%
          dplyr::transmute(
            title = parameter_label,
            path = png_path,
            alt = paste("Landscape density for", focus_pid, parameter_label)
          ),
        cols = 2L
      )
    }
    emit_report_image(focus_res$focus_figure_paths$parity, alt = paste("Landscape parity for", focus_pid))
    emit_report_image(focus_res$focus_figure_paths$beneficial_heatmap, alt = paste("Beneficial heatmap for", focus_pid))
    emit_report_image(focus_res$focus_figure_paths$state_fitness, alt = paste("State fitness decomposition for", focus_pid))
    emit_report_image(focus_res$focus_figure_paths$edge_delta, alt = paste("Edge delta decomposition for", focus_pid))
    emit_report_image(focus_res$focus_figure_paths$edge_beneficial, alt = paste("Edge beneficial decomposition for", focus_pid))
  }
}
```
